reviews.review_description:
Not many other folks get to see this section, huh? I'm not even sure what to put here myself.

So, how much do you wanna bet that other dude refunded this app straight after writing their little TikTok promo? I'm sure as hell not refunding it; enjoy the $250 devs, you've earned it for dabbling in XR for medical training software.

My ref*rral for this app will be available on the Meta-Dog website for anyone that wants a whole $60 off and I suppose as proof that I'm not refunding it.

😘
im the guy with the ishowspeed pfp and i paid 240 dollars for this game also my tiktok is stupidguynojoke

Good apps but it needs bug repair like shaking display on freezing mode.. 
more defect Type like TOF APV, tricuspid regurgitation ec..
And i hope you would add feature like you can set body movement of the fetus manually… 
And it would be perfect if we can measure Fetal arythmia or cardiac function disorder…

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review!
- we will look into the shaking display on freeze - it should not happen
- more defects will be added as a free updates to the app in future (it is still Early Access)
- we are now implementing manual setting the movement/position of the fetus -it should be available soon 
- the fetal arrhytmia measurement (and other measurements) is something we think about, but it will take some time until it will be available in the app.
-
